title: Verify existing implementation of slugify utility
description: The slugify utility already exists at `src/utils/slugify.ts` with 18 passing tests covering: lowercase conversion, space-to-hyphen replacement, special character stripping, unicode/accent normalization, multiple hyphen collapsing, and leading/trailing hyphen stripping. The task requested `src/utils/slug.ts` but the implementation is in `slugify.ts` which is consistent with the project's naming convention for other single-function utilities.
existing_patterns: src/utils/slugify.ts — single-function utility module with JSDoc documentation
src/utils/*.test.ts — co-located test files using vitest with describe/it/expect
